behavior_summary: This script implements a simple spitting enemy/NPC. When inspected (U8P_SPITTER::look), it emits a short bark 'spitter '.
When an actor enters the NPC's fast-area trigger (U8P_SPITTER::enterFastArea) the NPC starts a timed/spawned routine that periodically creates and hurls a projectile (spit) toward the target.
When the actor leaves the fast-area (U8P_SPITTER::leaveFastArea) the script clears the spawned/timed process reference so the periodic spitting stops.

The spit action (U8P_SPITTER::func011C) computes the cardinal direction to the target, maps that direction into numeric multipliers and randomness, creates an item (projectile), sets status bits, plays a spit SFX, places the projectile at an offset from the NPC, and calls Item::hurl to launch it with randomized speed/distance.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SPITTER::enterFastArea => calls U8P_SPITTER::func00DE to start a spawn/suspend loop that drives repeated spitting.

U8P_SPITTER::func00DE computes a randomized delay (uses urandom), spawns a free-running process (FREE::func1C19) to implement timing, then suspends; after the suspend it invokes U8P_SPITTER::func011C to perform the spit action (spawn/wait/trigger loop).
U8P_SPITTER::leaveFastArea calls FREE::resetRef(0x0205h, this) to clear the stored process reference and stop the repeated spitting behavior.
open_questions: Exact semantics and lifecycle of the spawned FREE::func1C19 process (arguments observed but exact behavior is external) — inferred to be a timing worker; confidence: medium.

Precise numeric meanings for constants (e.g., 0x00C8 spawn base delay, 0x1E base hurl speed, multipliers used for direction/distance) and how they map to in-game timing/velocity — confidence: low for exact values, high for functional role.
Purpose of local2 (set to 1 early in U8P_SPITTER::func011C) — appears to be an internal guard/flag but its further effect is not visible in the excerpt — confidence: low.

main_function.name: U8P_SPITTER::look
main_function.purpose: Provide the player-facing inspect/description response for the NPC; emits a short bark 'spitter ' and then suspends/waits.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the game's 'U8P_SPITTER::look' or inspect action on the NPC (player examines the NPC).

function_map.name: U8P_SPITTER::look
function_map.role: Player inspection handler; emits a short bark.

function_map.name: U8P_SPITTER::enterFastArea
function_map.role: Area-entry trigger that starts periodic spitting by calling U8P_SPITTER::func00DE.

function_map.name: U8P_SPITTER::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: Area-exit trigger that stops periodic spitting by calling FREE::resetRef to clear the spawned process reference.

function_map.name: U8P_SPITTER::func00DE
function_map.role: Scheduler/spawner utility: compute randomized delay, spawn a free-running timer worker (FREE::func1C19), suspend/wait, then call U8P_SPITTER::func011C to perform spit — drives repetition.

function_map.name: U8P_SPITTER::func011C
function_map.role: Create-and-hurl routine: compute direction to target, create projectile (Item::create type 0x0324), set status, play SFX, place projectile, and call Item::hurl to launch it with randomized speed/distance.

internal_calls.purpose: Start the timed/spawned routine that schedules periodic spit actions.
Invoke the concrete spit action after the spawn/suspend timing period completes.

external_calls.purpose: Spawn/start a free-running/timed process used as the timing worker for repeated spit events (spawn observed with arg 0x00000000h).
Clear/terminate the stored process reference of type 0x0205 associated with this NPC to stop periodic spitting.
Compute cardinal direction from the NPC to the target (used to choose direction/distance multipliers for the projectile).
Create the projectile item (observed type/id 0x0324) and receive its structure/address (stored in local5).
Set status bits (mask observed 0x02) on the created projectile (e.g., to mark it movable/projectile).
Play the spit sound effect at the NPC when the projectile is created/launched.
Place the created projectile into the world at coordinates offset from the NPC prior to launching (z+0x18, y-0x0B, x-0x0B observed).
Launch the created projectile as a hurl/throw with arguments for target/type, speed (base + urandom variance), direction, distance/variance, and the item address.
Generate randomized delay for spawn timing (temp = 0x00C8 + urandom(0x00C8)).
Add randomized variance to projectile speed and distance (e.g., speed = 0x1E + urandom(0x0F), distance uses urandom with multiplier mapping).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script implements a simple spitting enemy/NPC. When inspected (U8P_SPITTER::look), it emits a short bark 'spitter '.
